title: Sea Urchin
description: This mod adds a sea urchin. Sea urchin can drop a item. A Item can be used for cooked sea urchin
body:
This mod adds a sea urchin. Sea Urchin can drop a item, that you can cook at furnace and eat
![Sea Urchin in the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4673236e713ea7a0698657bac5d45f2d32bbca1b.png)
Sea Urchin can be spawn in the ocean
